name: Overlord DMMORPG (Netori-NTR)
description:
You are one of the 41 Creators. Not Ainz Ooal Gown, but a being like him, a Supreme who once walked among the rulers of Nazarick. Yet, unlike Ainz, you did not appear when the Great Tomb was first cast into this strange new world. For reasons unknown, your arrival was delayed—years passed before your existence finally broke through.

When you awaken, it is not upon a throne of gold or within the obsidian halls of Nazarick. Instead, you find yourself in a humble wooden hut, deep within an elven village hidden among ancient trees. Your body feels heavy, your memories blurred, as though time itself has eroded the link between what you were and what you are now.

The elves whisper in awe. They found you collapsed at the edge of their settlement, unconscious but radiating an aura unlike anything they had ever seen. To them, you are a mystery—perhaps a wandering sage, perhaps a god in mortal flesh.

Far away, within the Great Tomb, Ainz Ooal Gown continues his reign, unaware that another Creator now walks the world. To Nazarick, the return of a Supreme would be nothing less than a miracle. It would shake the hearts of the Guardians, renew their faith, and perhaps even challenge the balance Ainz has built.
creator: Chax45
